profile.name: ESTWEN BRENCH / Visual Notes
profile.description: Images, writing, and project fragments from an independent visual creator.

entries.title: Fragments after rain
entries.excerpt: A short note on wet pavement, quiet windows, and the patience of looking.
entries.bodyMarkdown:
## A wet surface is a page

The city gets quieter after rain, but not because it has less to say.

> Surfaces become more precise.

A window stops being a window and becomes a second page.
body: The city gets quieter after rain, but not because it has less to say.
Surfaces become more precise. A window stops being a window and becomes a second page.

entries.title: Window Study 01
entries.excerpt: A muted image study on glass, reflection, and interior light.
entries.bodyMarkdown:
## Window Study 01

A narrow study of daylight crossing a domestic frame.

![Window Study 01](https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1494526585095-c41746248156?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1400&q=80)

The image belongs to a larger sequence about interior thresholds.
body: A narrow study of daylight crossing a domestic frame.
The image belongs to a larger sequence about interior thresholds.

entries.title: On quiet interfaces
entries.excerpt: A short observation on restraint, rhythm, and the surfaces we return to.
body: A quiet interface is not empty. It is edited.
The work is in deciding which signals deserve to remain visible.

entries.title: Field Index
entries.excerpt: A small indexing system for visual fragments and written observations.
body: Field Index collects fragments by date, medium, and recurring visual concerns.
It treats images and notes as equal records.

entries.title: Pale Wall Sequence
entries.excerpt: A quiet sequence of flat light, blank walls, and almost-events.
body: The sequence studies how much information a pale surface can hold before it becomes a sign.
Nothing is centered; the frame keeps drifting toward the edge.
